---
title: "Selected_genomevisualisation"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-07"
---

Code written by Google Gemini and then modified by me.
ERG11context_combined.csv manually taken from the relevant gff files, themselves created using Reform.

```{r inputs}
library(ggplot2)
library(gggenes)

data <- read.csv("ERG11context_combined.csv")
```

```{r setup}
# gggenes expects a 'forward' column where TRUE is + and FALSE is -
data$direction <- ifelse(data$Or == "+", TRUE, FALSE)
```

```{r plot}

Contextplot=ggplot(data, aes(xmin = Start, xmax = Stop, y = Chr, fill = Type, label = Name, forward = direction)) +
  # Draw the background line (genomic coordinate)
  #geom_feature(aes(x = Start), y = "Chr VIII") + 
  # Draw arrows for genes and features
  geom_gene_arrow(forward = data$direction, arrowhead_height = unit(3, "mm"), arrowhead_width = unit(1, "mm")) +
  # Add labels for the genes
  #geom_gene_label(aes(label = Name), align = "left", size = 10) +
  # Use separate facets if you have multiple chromosomes
  facet_wrap(~ Chr, scales = "free", ncol = 1) +
  # Styling
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  theme_genes() +
  labs(title = "Genomic Context of ERG11",
       x = "Genomic Position (bp)",
       fill = "Feature Type") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

Contextplot

ggsave("ERG11construct_genomiccontext.pdf", Contextplot, device="pdf")
```
